query:
SELECT p.id, p.name, p.location, p.priority, p.actionTier, p.discoveryStatus, p.discoveryAttempts,
  DATE(p.lastDiscoveryAt) AS last_discovery,
  (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT c.id) FROM contacts c JOIN contactProjects cp ON cp.contactId = c.id WHERE cp.projectId = p.id AND c.crmOrphan = 0) AS total_contacts,
  (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT c.id) FROM contacts c JOIN contactProjects cp ON cp.contactId = c.id WHERE cp.projectId = p.id AND c.crmOrphan = 0 AND c.contactTrustTier = 'send_ready') AS send_ready,
  (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT c.id) FROM contacts c JOIN contactProjects cp ON cp.contactId = c.id WHERE cp.projectId = p.id AND c.crmOrphan = 0 AND c.contactTrustTier = 'named_unverified') AS named_unverified
FROM projects p
WHERE p.priority = 'hot'
  AND p.suppressed = 0
  AND p.discoveryStatus IN ('discovery_queued', 'named_contact_no_email', 'no_contacts', 'blocked_dirty_owner')
ORDER BY p.actionTier ASC, p.discoveryAttempts ASC, p.name ASC
LIMIT 20;

SELECT p.id, p.name, p.location, p.priority, p.actionTier, p.discoveryStatus, p.discoveryAttempts,
  DATE(p.lastDiscoveryAt) AS last_discovery,
  (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT c.id) FROM contacts c JOIN contactProjects cp ON cp.contactId = c.id WHERE cp.projectId = p.id AND c.crmOrphan = 0) AS total_contacts,
  (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT c.id) FROM contacts c JOIN contactProjects cp ON cp.contactId = c.id WHERE cp.projectId = p.id AND c.crmOrphan = 0 AND c.contactTrustTier = 'send_ready') AS send_ready,
  (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT c.id) FROM contacts c JOIN contactProjects cp ON cp.contactId = c.id WHERE cp.projectId = p.id AND c.crmOrphan = 0 AND c.contactTrustTier = 'named_unverified') AS named_unverified
FROM projects p
WHERE p.priority = 'hot'
  AND p.suppressed = 0
  AND p.discoveryStatus IN ('discovery_queued', 'named_contact_no_email', 'no_contacts', 'blocked_dirty_owner')
ORDER BY p.actionTier ASC, p.discoveryAttempts ASC, p.name ASC
LIMIT 20;
